Feed post

Ken Haumschilt

 
 • 2nd

Helping QSR operators increase drive-thru throughput + reduce labor with AI ordering.

View my services

6d • 

Follow

$81M just got poured into Chowbus to put AI in restaurants. Let that sink in.

A Chicago startup, Chowbus, just raised a massive round to build what they’re calling an “AI-powered operating system” for restaurants.

Not a marketing tool. Not a chatbot. An entire system to run:
• orders
• calls
• marketing
• payments
• operations

Here’s the reality most people are missing:
This isn’t “innovation.”This is replacement. Restaurants are about to replace:
• front desk staff
• call centers
• manual ordering
• fragmented software tool

…with AI systems that never miss a call, never forget an upsell, and operate 24/7. And it’s not coming in 3–5 years. It’s already happening.

While most companies are still building platforms and raising capital, we’ve been focused on something different:

👉 Installing AI systems directly into restaurant operations right now.
Not theory. Not demos. Over 15,000 REAL IMPLEMENTATIONS!!.

The biggest gap in this market isn’t technology. It’s execution.
Restaurant owners don’t need another platform.
They need someone who can walk in and say:
“Here’s your AI system. It’s live in 14 days.”
That’s the opportunity.

Over the next 12–24 months, there will be two types of operators:
Those who adopt AI early and increase margins + throughput
Those who wait… and get outpaced

If you operate multiple locations (especially drive-thru), this shift will hit your business faster than you think. We’re already working with operators across the USA to deploy AI across:

• phone ordering
• automation workflows

In a recent survey of 600 restaurant professionals a wide margin of 38% reported scheduling and labor optimization. Think about that for a minute: 4 out of 10 would like mind-numbing tasks to end so that they can focus on KEY TASKS!!. 

THAT IS WHAT KEYTASK.AI CAN DO FOR YOU!!

If you want to see what this looks like inside a real operation, Call me 310.893.893 or email me ken@keytask.ai to start a pilot at one of your locations.  The window to get ahead of this is now.
